organic-guys-uganda-received-2-5-billion.hook: Guys, Uganda received $2.5 BILLION in remittances last year — but how much of that got eaten by fees?

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator on camera, shocked face, drops the $2.5B stat to earn attention. Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record shows a traditional wire transfer app charging 5-8% fees on a $200 send — '$16 gone before mom sees a cent.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Switch to Speed Wallet screen-record — same $200 sent, zero fee, arrives in seconds. Beat 4 (46-55s): Back to talking head — 'Link in bio. Stop donating your money to banks.'
payload.production_notes: Phone camera only. Use CapCut auto-captions. Overlay the fee math as bold text cards. Film in one take, keep energy high on the stat drop. No tripod needed — handheld adds authenticity.

organic-sending-money-to-family-is-my-lo.hook: Sending money to family is my love language — but I refuse to let fees steal part of it.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Creator (ideally Latina or Filipino woman) holds phone, warm tone — 'Every month I send money home, no matter what.' Beat 2 (8-22s): Shows old method — 'Used to lose $12-20 every single send. That's $240 a year just… gone.' Beat 3 (23-45s): Opens Speed Wallet, shows zero-fee send completing in real time, recipient gets a notification. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'This is how I keep the full love in the transfer. Try it free — link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Warm home lighting, kitchen or living room setting for authenticity. UGC creator preferred — source via micro-influencer brief for $50-150. Add soft background music. Subtitles mandatory (85% watch muted).

organic-i-tried-sending-bitcoin-for-the-.hook: I tried sending Bitcoin for the first time and it took 11 seconds. I literally panicked.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Creator, genuinely surprised face — 'I thought crypto was complicated. I was wrong.' Beat 2 (7-20s): Screen-record of downloading Speed Wallet, setting up a wallet in under 60 seconds — show the clock. Beat 3 (21-42s): Sends $5 via Lightning to a friend's phone number — transaction confirms in real time. Beat 4 (43-58s): Reaction shot — 'No seed phrases, no gas fees, no waiting. This is what Bitcoin was supposed to feel like.'
payload.production_notes: Screen-record the real app — no mock-ups. Use phone mount for steady screen shot. Add 'SENT ✅' text pop on confirmation. Keep creator energy authentic and slightly disbelieving — mirrors audience skepticism.

organic-which-african-diaspora-sends-the.hook: Which African diaspora sends the most money home? The answer might surprise you — and the fees will anger you.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator poses the diaspora remittance question on camera — builds tribal curiosity. Beat 2 (9-28s): Quick text-card animation ranking top sending countries (Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Ethiopia) with total volume stats — source World Bank data. Beat 3 (29-45s): 'But look at what gets lost in fees' — show a graphic of 5-8% fee cut on average $300 send. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Speed Wallet sends zero fees over Lightning. Same money, full amount. Link in bio.' End with #remittance #africa #diaspora tags.
payload.production_notes: Use CapCut's text animation for the ranking cards — free template. Creator should be Black African or African-American for cultural authenticity. Source a micro-creator in the diaspora finance niche ($75-150). World Bank data is public and citable.

organic-crypto-gave-me-financial-freedom.hook: Crypto gave me financial freedom — and it started with one $5 send.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Creator (young, relatable) — 'I used to think Bitcoin was for tech bros with $10K to invest. Then someone sent me $5.' Beat 2 (8-22s): Shows receiving $5 on Speed Wallet — 'Instantly in my wallet. No bank account needed. No ID drama.' Beat 3 (23-44s): 'I learned how it worked in a week. Now I use it to actually move money.' Quick montage of app screens — send, receive, balance. Beat 4 (45-58s): 'Start with $1. Seriously. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film in natural daylight. Keep the $1 CTA — low barrier is the entire point. Use trending audio from Instagram's royalty-free library. Overlay 'NO BANK NEEDED' and 'INSTANT' as text stickers. Creator should be 22-32, not finance-bro coded.

paid-your-family-never-gets-the-full-amo.hook: Your family never gets the full amount you send. Here's why — and how to fix it in 60 seconds.
paid-your-family-never-gets-the-full-amo.estimate: $1.80-$2.60 (below $3.17 benchmark — high relevance + fear-of-loss creative typically drives 20-40% CPI reduction in remittance verticals)

payload.problem: Cut to split-screen: left side shows a $300 transfer with $18 in fees deducted, right side shows a tearful phone call — 'Mom said she only got $282.' Voiceover: 'Every major remittance service skims 5-8% off every send. On $300 a month, that's $216 a year stolen from your family.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet: enter amount ($300), select recipient by phone number, hit send — confirmation in 9 seconds. Bold text overlay: '$300 SENT. $300 RECEIVED. $0 IN FEES.' Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning — the only way to send money globally with zero fees and instant delivery.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet free. Send your first transfer today — zero fees, guaranteed.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): Hispanic 25-45, Filipino 25-44, Nigerian/Ghanaian 22-40, US-based, interests: international money transfer, Western Union, Remitly, family abroad, immigrant communities

paid-i-bought-my-first-bitcoin-in-11-sec.hook: I bought my first Bitcoin in 11 seconds. No exchange. No wallet setup. No idea what I was doing.
paid-i-bought-my-first-bitcoin-in-11-sec.estimate: $2.40-$3.10 (near benchmark — curiosity-gap + low-barrier CTA should offset crypto category's typically higher CPIs)

payload.problem: Talking head — relatable 26-year-old: 'Every time I tried to get into crypto, I gave up. Coinbase wanted my ID for 3 days. MetaMask gave me 12 words to memorize and I lost them. It felt like crypto didn't want regular people.' Cut to frustrated phone tapping.
payload.solution: Screen-record: download Speed Wallet, enter phone number, receive $5 from a friend — wallet live in 45 seconds. 'No seed phrases. No KYC wait. No minimums. Just scan, send, done.' Show the Lightning payment confirm animation. Creator: 'This is actually how easy it should have always been.'
payload.cta: Get Speed Wallet. Start with $1. It takes less time than this ad.
payload.audience: TikTok: crypto-curious 18-34, interests: personal finance, investing for beginners, financial freedom, Robinhood, Cash App, followed finance creators — exclude existing crypto holders

paid-withdrew-my-winnings-in-4-seconds-n.hook: Withdrew my winnings in 4 seconds. Not 4 days. 4 seconds.
paid-withdrew-my-winnings-in-4-seconds-n.estimate: $2.90-$3.80 (slightly above benchmark possible due to small iGaming audience pool; strong instant-gratification creative should compress toward benchmark with frequency optimization)

payload.problem: UGC-style creator, casual tone: 'I used to play on sites where cashing out took 3-5 business days. Then they'd ask for documents I'd already submitted. Meanwhile my money is just… hostage.' Cut to dramatized waiting — phone refresh, clock spinning.
payload.solution: Screen-record of iGaming platform deposit via Speed Wallet Lightning QR — funds hit instantly. Then withdrawal — same speed, same zero fee. 'Speed Wallet connects to Lightning-native gaming sites. Deposit instantly. Withdraw in seconds. No holds, no minimums, no fees.' Show balance update in real time.
payload.cta: Speed Wallet. Instant deposits. Instant withdrawals. Download now.
payload.audience: Meta + TikTok: iGaming 21-40 male, interests: online poker, sports betting, casino apps, crypto gambling, DraftKings, FanDuel — geo: US states where online gaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, NV, CO, IL)
